title: Bribery System
description: Pay politicians for favorable policy outcomes. High corruption cities require regular bribes to get things done, but almost anything is possible at the right price. Bribery is a tool for rapid policy change.
definition-of-done: Bribery action for policy outcomes. Cost scales with city corruption and request difficulty. High corruption cities more bribable. Bribe costs and success visible.
testing-plan: Verify bribery action works. Test cost scaling. Verify corruption affects difficulty. Test bribe preview.
todos: Create cost calculation based on factors
